# Corporate Contributor License Agreement

**owenloop — Corporate Copyright Assignment Agreement — Version 1.0**

This Corporate Contributor License Agreement ("Agreement") is for a corporation,
partnership, or other legal entity (the **"Corporation"**) that wishes to
contribute to **owenloop**, a project owned by **Typical Day LLC** ("Typical Day").
It applies when an employee's Contributions may be owned by their employer.

An authorized representative of the Corporation must complete and sign this
Agreement, and the Corporation must keep the list of Designated Employees (Schedule
A) current.

## 1. Definitions

- **"Corporation"** means the entity identified in the signature block, together
  with all other entities that control, are controlled by, or are under common
  control with it.
- **"Contribution"**, **"Copyright"**, **"Material"**, and **"Submit"** have the
  meanings given in the individual owenloop CLA.
- **"Designated Employees"** means the employees and agents of the Corporation
  listed in Schedule A, as updated in writing from time to time.

## 2. Assignment, Fallback License, License-back, and Patent License

The Corporation, on behalf of itself and its Designated Employees, grants to
Typical Day the same rights, on the same terms, as set out in Sections 2 and 3 of
the individual owenloop CLA:

- **(a)** assignment of all Copyright in Contributions to Typical Day (Section 2.1);
- **(b)** a license-back to the Corporation and the contributing employee to use
  their own Contributions (Section 2.2);
- **(c)** a fallback exclusive license, including the right to relicense under any
  terms, should the assignment be ineffective (Section 2.3); and
- **(d)** the patent license (Section 3).

## 3. Representations

The Corporation represents that:

1. **(a)** each Designated Employee is authorized to Submit Contributions on the
   Corporation's behalf;
2. **(b)** the Corporation is legally entitled to grant the rights in this
   Agreement for Contributions Submitted by its Designated Employees; and
3. **(c)** it will notify Typical Day if any of these representations becomes
   inaccurate.

## 4. Scope

This Agreement covers Contributions Submitted by the Corporation's Designated
Employees. Individuals not listed on Schedule A remain subject to the individual
CLA. The Corporation may add or remove Designated Employees by delivering an
updated Schedule A to Typical Day; removal is not retroactive as to Contributions
already Submitted.

## 5. Miscellaneous

Sections 4 (Moral Rights), 6 (Third-Party Materials), 7 (Disclaimer), and 8
(Miscellaneous) of the individual owenloop CLA apply to this Agreement, read as if
references to "You" were references to the "Corporation".
